root_cause.summary: The sync-react workflow invokes `git push origin update/react/...` via scripts/sync-react.js, and the push is rejected with HTTP 403: `remote: Permission to vercel/next.js.git denied to nextjs-bot`. The bot token or workflow permissions are not allowed to push to the repository. Fix on the workflow side (grant write access, swap to a PAT, or review Dependabot-like bot permissions).

required_signals.value: Error: Command failed with exit code 128
remote: Permission to vercel/next.js.git denied to nextjs-bot.
fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/': The requested URL returned error: 403

evidence_spans.reason: git-push failure, 403 permission-denied stderr, sync-react.js stack frame, pnpm ELIFECYCLE and GHA exit marker.
